content.question: The relationship between catchment-assignment rules and actual school-access barriers for children in villages assigned to distant schools is not quantified; it is unclear how many pupils face >30 min daily round-trip travel, how attendance/health outcomes vary by distance, and what safeguards (transport funding, safety protocols) currently exist.
content.reduction_path: A national or regional household-survey study measuring school-access barriers, commute times, pupil attendance rates, and health outcomes by distance-to-school and settlement type in villages assigned to catchment schools.
